title: Iran officially informs US through Pakistan: negotiations 'a waste of time'
snippet: Al Jazeera reports Iran formally communicated through Pakistani intermediaries that negotiations would be 'a waste of time.' Iran cited three specific reasons: (1) failure to extend ceasefire to cover Lebanon, (2) excessive US demands, (3) ongoing naval blockade. This is the first formal diplomatic communication of rejection through official channels, as opposed to media statements.
tag_reason: 4/19 이란 2차 회담 거부(src-295)의 후속. 신규 정보: (1) 파키스탄 중개를 통한 공식 외교 채널 사용, (2) 구체적 3가지 거부 사유 명시(레바논 휴전 미포함, 과도한 요구, 봉쇄).
